code: import React from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import{useInView}from'../../hooks/useInView';import'./BlogPreview.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const BlogPreview=()=>{const[revealRef,revealVisible]=useInView();const blogPosts=[{id:1,category:"Budget",title:"2023 Autumn Statement: What the Budget means for you",excerpt:"Understand the 2023 UK Autumn Statement's tax cuts and business enhancements, including NI rate reduction, self-employment tax reforms, and R&D modifications.",slug:"2023-autumn-statement"},{id:2,category:"Strategy",title:"Outsourced CFO Services: The Secret to Unlocking Financial Success for Digital Creative Agencies",excerpt:"A CFO can be a key member of your management team, dedicated to driving the financial affairs and daily operations of the business.",slug:"outsourced-cfo-services"},{id:3,category:"Pricing",title:"From Price to Value: How Creative Agencies Can Build a More Profitable Business",excerpt:"Competing on price leads to narrow profit margins, difficult customers, and financial troubles.",slug:"price-to-value"}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{className:"blog-preview",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"container",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{ref:revealRef,className:`blog-preview-reveal reveal-group ${revealVisible?'is-visible':''}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"blog-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"section-title reveal-item",children:"Read our latest insights"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"section-subtitle reveal-item",children:"Looking to stay up-to-date on the latest trends and best practices? Look no further than our blog, where we share valuable insights and expert advice to help you Make More and Keep More."})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"blog-grid",children:blogPosts.map(post=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:`/blog/${post.slug}`,className:"blog-card reveal-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"blog-category",children:post.category}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"blog-title",children:post.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"blog-excerpt",children:post.excerpt}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"blog-link",children:"Read more \u2192"})]},post.id))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"cta-center reveal-item",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/blog",className:"btn-outline btn-large",children:"View all"})})]})})});};export default BlogPreview;
